description_long: This object is a compact, modern shotgun with a distinctive bullpup design, featuring a matte black finish and a polymer exterior. The main body is rectangular and robust, with a prominent integrated carrying handle and a top-mounted Picatinny rail for accessory attachment. The trigger area is enclosed within a large, rounded trigger guard that also forms part of the ergonomic grip, which includes finger grooves for improved handling. The barrel is short and protrudes slightly from the front, with a visible muzzle and a small front sight. The rear section is solid and blocky, likely housing the magazine and action mechanism, while the overall form is streamlined for ease of maneuverability in tight urban environments. The design suggests a focus on tactical use, with minimal external moving parts and a sturdy, utilitarian appearance.
description: A compact, bullpup-style shotgun with a matte black polymer body, integrated carrying handle, and ergonomic grip with finger grooves. Features a short barrel, top Picatinny rail, and a robust, tactical design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, integrated carrying handle, Picatinny rail, and ergonomic grip with finger grooves.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the short barrel, muzzle, and the width of the carrying handle and rail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the same features from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid, blocky stock and the back of the carrying handle.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded, elongated trigger guard integrated with the grip and featuring finger grooves
